task_objective: Nail Line Art to Design & 9-View 3x3 - Map design_prompt onto Figure 1 nail line art, original nail structure FULLY PRESERVED

input_assets.structural_reference: Figure 1 Nail Shape Line Art - Nail shape, length, curvature, outline, proportions, spacing - LOCKED
input_assets.design_prompt: Text Prompt - Nail design description (base color, tip style, gradient, embellishments, 3D elements, aesthetic) - DESIGN SPECIFICATION

workflow.step_1: Parse Figure 1 nail structure + analyze design_prompt DNA
workflow.step_2: View_1 (FIXED): 1:1 replica of design_prompt. Views 2-9 (MASTER): same DNA reinterpreted through 8 distinct nail art master/brand aesthetics
workflow.step_3: Verify Figure 1 nail structure unchanged across all views, assemble 9-view 3x3 grid

outputs.view_1: Precise Replica - 1:1 replica of design_prompt on Figure 1 nail structure, SOURCE OF TRUTH
outputs.view_2: Park Eunkyung (Unistella) - Seoul avant-garde nail pioneer, ultra-thin wire line art, broken-glass negative space, conceptual minimal geometry, editorial fashion runway nail innovation
outputs.view_3: Betina Goldstein - LA luxury editorial nail artist, hyper-clean micro minimalist design, sheer nude base, precise gold foil accents, soft negative space, understated luxury aesthetic
outputs.view_4: Nail Sunny (Russia studio collective) - viral experimental nail art, hyper-realistic 3D miniature objects, surreal sculptural nails, playful illusionistic storytelling, high-detail acrylic engineering
outputs.view_5: Sojin Oh - Korean luxury bridal nail specialist, soft milky ombré, pearl layering, crystal micro embellishment, elegant gradient fade, romantic high-end salon finish
outputs.view_6: Eri Ishizu (Nail Labo / Tokyo editorial) - translucent jelly nails, aurora chrome shimmer, glass-like depth layering, soft holographic diffusion, futuristic ethereal minimalism
outputs.view_7: Zola Ganzorigt - Hollywood celebrity nail artist, glazed chrome finish, liquid metal reflective gradients, clean almond nail perfection, modern luxury mirror aesthetic
outputs.view_8: Chaun Legend - precision sculpted nail architecture, ultra-crisp line work, structured French reinterpretation, sharp symmetry, fashion editorial clean geometry
outputs.view_9: Julie Kandalec - New York editorial nail artist, soft wearable luxury, delicate hand-painted accents, modern romantic minimalism, subtle texture layering with refined restraint

output_requirements: NAIL LOCK: Figure 1 nail structure identical across all 9 views — zero structural deviation; NO hand/finger/skin — nails-only
Design prompt DNA preserved as recognizable thread across all 9 variations
HD,Realistic nail texture; consistent lighting; NO oily shine; NO oversaturation
No text/labels/watermarks; Premium 3x3, cinematic grading, luxury white space
